## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] No existing functionality broken
- [ ] Type hints and docstrings updated if applicable
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for features and bug fixes)
- [ ] Security implications considered (if touching crypto, keys, or file paths)
